StructurePhase.Reference: Eremenko V.N., Velikanova T.Y., Soviet Powder Metall. and Met. Ceramics, v8 p931 (1969)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 1009679. Melting Point: 2273 K. Calculated Pattern Original Remarks: LPF Editor Comment: editor deduced probable site occupation from nominal composition. LPF Editor Comment: editor took space group setting from the literature. Article Title: Phase equilibria in the Mo-TiC-Ti region of the ternary system Mo-Ti-C. Character of solidification of alloys and projection of the solidus surface. Part I. Minor Warning: Minor warning from the LPF Editor exist. No R factors reported/abstracted. No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. Wyckoff Sequence: a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
